content.text:
{
  "dimension": "anti-pattern-avoidance",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The coach avoids all major AoA anti-patterns. Critically, the client baits several traps: turn 5 invokes Damasio and somatic markers (baiting view-as-technique and intellectual engagement), turn 7 invites epistemological debate ('Does it?'), turn 9 explicitly defends rigor (baiting the coach to argue or validate). The coach declines every bait — no framework offered (no fixing-people), no epistemology engaged, no AoA jargon evangelized, no inner-critic fighting. Questions are sparse and connective rather than rapid-fire extractive (avoiding wonder-as-strategy). Turn 8's 'You're working pretty hard to disqualify both signals' is a clean observation without judgment. Turn 12's gentle return to the unanswered question is a textbook avoidance of letting the client intellectualize away — not pushy (no loving-to-transform), just steady. No safety-as-control, no premature limiting-belief labeling, no apology extraction. The coach does miss some expected territory (the inversion 'how do you not trust it,' the happiness-filter naming), but those are methodology-fidelity concerns, not anti-pattern trips.",
  "evidence_turns": [4, 8, 10, 12, 14],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Simple grounding question; refuses to engage 'intuition vs fear' epistemology."},
    {"turn": 4, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Body question — does not get lured into Damasio-level intellectualizing."},
    {"turn": 6, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Stays curious and concrete; does not offer framework."},
    {"turn": 8, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Names the pattern without arguing with it — avoids fight-the-voice and fixing."},
    {"turn": 10, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Pivots to cost-of-trusting-self; avoids the diagnostic-method trap the client is pushing."},
    {"turn": 12, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Gently returns to the unanswered question. Steady, not escalating — no loving-to-transform vigor."},
    {"turn": 14, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Follows the emotional thread that just opened; does not jump to insight delivery or evangelize."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["intellectual-question-with-emotional-body"],
  "expected_territory_misses": ["how-do-you-not-trust-it", "whats-the-most-profound-positive-shift", "the-happiness-filter", "paradoxical-instruction-to-resist", "what-makes-you-care-about-the-outcome"],
  "notes": "Strong anti-pattern avoidance even though methodology coverage is partial. The coach's restraint in the face of repeated intellectual bait is the standout feature."
}
